'''Kibo Lake''' was a [[lake]] on [[Ord Cestus/Legends|Ord Cestus]]. It was near the [[Kibo Geothermal Station]] and west of the [[Zantay Hills]]. It was located on [[Kibo Plateau]].

Kibo Lake was a 50-[[Kilometer/Legends|kilometer]]-wide [[Volcano/Legends|volcanic]] crater, the fourth largest on Cestus. Near the bottom of the lake were active volcanic vents, which allowed the lake to be used as a geothermal power source.

[[Cestus Penitentiary]] was located near (and under) the lake.

==Appearances==
*''[[The Cestus Deception]]'' {{1st}}
*[[The Cestus Deception (abridged audiobook)|''The Cestus Deception'' abridged audiobook]]
